title: UGI Corporation API Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for UGI utility account and service data entities.

EnergyAccount.description: A UGI utility customer account for natural gas, electric, or propane service.

fields.serviceAddress: object — Street address of service location
fields.billingSummary: object — Amount due, due date, last payment
fields.usageSummary: object — Current/previous readings, usage, billing period

MeterReading.description: A meter reading record for energy usage tracking.

fields.readingDate: string(date) — Date of the meter reading
